  1133→    pub id: Option<Secret<String>>,
  1134→    pub authentication_token: Option<AccessTokenAuthenticationResponse>,
  1135→    // Add more keys if required

  1137→
  1138→// This is for backward compatibility
  1139→impl TryFrom<router_data::ConnectorAuthType> for AccessTokenRequestData {
  1140→    type Error = ApiErrorResponse;
  1141→    fn try_from(connector_auth: router_data::ConnectorAuthType) -> Result<Self, Self::Error> {
  1142→        match connector_auth {
  1143→            router_data::ConnectorAuthType::HeaderKey { api_key } => Ok(Self {
  1144→                app_id: api_key,
  1145→                id: None,
  1146→                authentication_token: None,
  1147→            }),
  1148→            router_data::ConnectorAuthType::BodyKey { api_key, key1 } => Ok(Self {
  1149→                app_id: api_key,
  1150→                id: Some(key1),
  1151→                authentication_token: None,
  1152→            }),
  1153→            router_data::ConnectorAuthType::SignatureKey { api_key, key1, .. } => Ok(Self {
  1154→                app_id: api_key,
  1155→                id: Some(key1),
  1156→                authentication_token: None,
  1157→            }),
  1158→            router_data::ConnectorAuthType::MultiAuthKey { api_key, key1, .. } => Ok(Self {
  1159→                app_id: api_key,
  1160→                id: Some(key1),
  1161→                authentication_token: None,
  1162→            }),
  1163→
  1164→            _ => Err(ApiErrorResponse::InvalidDataValue {
  1165→                field_name: "connector_account_details",
  1166→            }),
  1167→        }
  1168→    }
  1169→}
  1170→
  1171→impl
  1172→    TryFrom<(
  1173→        router_data::ConnectorAuthType,
  1174→        Option<AccessTokenAuthenticationResponse>,
  1175→    )> for AccessTokenRequestData
  1176→{
  1177→    type Error = ApiErrorResponse;
  1178→    fn try_from(
  1179→        (connector_auth, authentication_token): (
  1180→            router_data::ConnectorAuthType,
  1181→            Option<AccessTokenAuthenticationResponse>,
  1182→        ),
  1183→    ) -> Result<Self, Self::Error> {
  1184→        let mut access_token_request_data = Self::try_from(connector_auth)?;
  1185→        access_token_request_data.authentication_token = authentication_token;
  1186→        Ok(access_token_request_data)
  1187→    }
  1188→}
